category.scope_note: Portable lithium battery cells, battery packs, and power banks (China export to Georgia) compliance gap comparison.

title.en: China-to-Georgia Lithium Battery & Power Bank Compliance Gap Matrix
title.zh: 中国锂电池/移动电源进入格鲁吉亚：合规差距矩阵
title.zht: 中國鋰電池/行動電源進入喬治亞：合規差距矩陣

description.en: Public-interest, source-linked comparison of China export compliance against Georgia (GEOSTM) requirements for lithium batteries and power banks, including battery safety, EMC/CE style obligations, GNCC radio compliance, UN 38.3 transport and importer-based market access.
description.zh: 公益性、附来源链接的中国锂电池/移动电源与格鲁吉亚（GEOSTM）要求对照：包括电芯安全、EMC/CE式义务、GNCC射频要求、UN 38.3运输以及以进口商为主的市场准入。
description.zht: 公益性、附來源連結的中國鋰電池/行動電源與喬治亞（GEOSTM）要求對照：包括電芯安全、EMC/CE式義務、GNCC射頻要求、UN 38.3運輸以及以進口商為主的市場准入。

disclaimer.en: For informational purposes only. Not legal advice. Regulations change; verify all requirements with qualified legal and technical advisors before export. This page does not constitute certification, legal opinion, customs ruling, or market-access approval.
disclaimer.zh: 仅供参考，不构成法律意见。法规随时变化，出口前请向具备资质的法律及技术顾问核实所有要求。本页不构成认证结论、法律意见、海关裁定或市场准入批准。
disclaimer.zht: 僅供參考，不構成法律意見。法規隨時變化，出口前請向具備資質的法律及技術顧問核實所有要求。本頁不構成認證結論、法律意見、海關裁定或市場准入批准。

answer_first.en: For exports of lithium batteries and power banks to Georgia, GEOSTM currently applies EU-style technical and market surveillance logic in many product paths, plus GNCC checks for wireless. Chinese GB 31241 and CCC export files are useful engineering inputs but do not complete Georgian market placement requirements.
answer_first.zh: 格鲁吉亚市场对锂电池和移动电源通常沿用欧盟式技术要求并配合市场监督体系，含无线功能还涉及GNCC。这些要求常与中国GB 31241和CCC证明并不一一对应。
answer_first.zht: 喬治亞市場對鋰電池和行動電源通常沿用歐盟式技術要求並配合市場監督體系，含無線功能還涉及GNCC。這些要求與中國GB 31241和CCC證明未必一一對應。

editorial_controls.change_policy: Update on official GEOSTM, GNCC, UN, transport, and customs source edits only; keep mandatory statuses current and log every official revision date in the row text.
